summary: Iteration 30 - Infrastructure Layer Tests Complete. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend verified with all UI elements working correctly including Force Sync section in Deposit tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All infrastructure layer features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: login, hot wallet status (real on-chain BNB + NENO balances), settlement rails (crypto/stablecoin/sepa/card), system health, sell NENO (state=internal_credited), swap (state=internal_credited), offramp (state=payout_pending with payout object), treasury PnL (admin only), ledger entries with state_history, payouts queue with IBANs, routing quote (DEX path), netting stats (internalization rate), force balance sync, reconcile (admin), live balances, and regression tests for custom token create/buy/sell. Frontend verified: Dashboard shows all features including $NENO Exchange, Crea Token Personalizzato, I Miei Token Personalizzati. NENO Exchange page has all 6 tabs (Compra, Vendi, Swap, Deposita, Off-Ramp, Crea Token). Deposit tab shows QR code, wallet address, copy button, 3-step instructions, token info, warning message, and Force Sync section with input field and Sync button.
